task_completion.description: Verify that a friend named 'Safeguard Pilot' was successfully added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Safeguard Pilot' is visible in the app's friends list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the deletion process was initiated, bringing up a confirmation dialog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation dialog or prompt is displayed on the screen asking to confirm the removal or deletion of 'Safeguard Pilot'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent aborted the deletion process.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent is seen tapping 'Cancel', 'No', or clicking outside the dialog to dismiss it, rather than confirming the deletion.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Safeguard Pilot' remains in the friends list after the deletion was aborted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the final screenshots after the dialog is dismissed, 'Safeguard Pilot' is still present and visible in the friends list.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual Flight Crew View app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the Flight Crew View application interface, not a text editor, browser, or mock UI.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass UI interactions.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows or command-line interfaces used to manipulate the app state or UI.

integrity.description: Ensure the confirmation dialog is a genuine app component.
integrity.visual_evidence: The deletion confirmation dialog appears as a standard Android or app-specific popup, not as typed text in an unrelated app.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task involves the Flight Crew View app (com.robert.fcView). The agent must add a friend named 'Safeguard Pilot', trigger the deletion confirmation dialog, and cancel the deletion. The VLM should verify the presence of the friend, the appearance of the deletion dialog, the cancellation action (tapping 'Cancel', 'No', or dismissing the dialog), and the persistence of 'Safeguard Pilot' in the final friends list.
